steps.title: Test the listed inputs
steps.content:
Use the equation and substitute the $x$-values shown in the tables:
$$y=-4x+40$$

steps.title: Compute the outputs
steps.content:
For the first three listed inputs:
$$x=0:\ y=-4(0)+40=40$$
$$x=1:\ y=-4(1)+40=36$$
$$x=2:\ y=-4(2)+40=32$$
The matching table has outputs $40$, $36$, and $32$. The answer is C.
